title.en: Performs piecemeal EMR of a large non-pedunculated colorectal polyp (LNPCP) independently

description.en: End-to-end performance of a piecemeal EMR — from lesion assessment and informed consent through resection, defect inspection, thermal margin ablation, and post-procedure communication — to a standard a supervisor can entrust unsupervised.

label.en: Act under proactive supervision — supervisor in room and engaged
Act under reactive supervision — supervisor immediately available
May supervise others performing this EPA
